subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God, Educator of the nations and Quickener of moldering bones! I beseech Thee by Thy Name which Thou hast made the Lord of Names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا مربی الامم و محیی الرمم اسئلک باسمک الذی جعلته مولی الاسماء
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for protection, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
